CommunityApplications.Profile: Gym App is a self-hosted, local-first workout tracker for personal or family use. It includes a 1,300+ exercise library with GIFs, custom exercises, group/routine builders, fixed and rolling workout schedules, workout logging, body weight tracking, weekly muscle heatmap, analytics, Excel export, multi-user support, backup/restore, and PWA install on mobile. For support, open an issue on the GitHub repository.
